rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Registry Modification of MaxMpxCt Parameters

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Registry Modification of MaxMpxCt Parameters
id: 9fc5784b-50ab-4f0e-8044-5e15990d48a1
status: experimental
description: Detects registry modifications to change MaxMpxCt settings. BlackCat
  does this to increase the number of outstanding requests allowed, such as SMB requests
  to distribute ransomware through an environment.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/04
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1105
- attack.t1562
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - LanmanServer
    - parameters
    - MaxMpxCt
    - '65535'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
